info.title: RAIDLOG API
info.description: RESTful API for managing RAIDLOG workspaces, projects, risks, actions, issues, decisions, and more.

post.description: Authenticate a user and generate a JWT token.

get.description: Retrieve the profile of the authenticated user.

put.description: Update the profile of the authenticated user.

patch.description: Update specific fields of the authenticated user's profile.

get.description: Retrieve the list of workspaces for the authenticated user.
Retrieve information about a specific workspace.

bearerAuth.description: JWT token obtained from the /users/login endpoint.
